title: Development History Page
description: Added a changelog page to track app changes, with data stored in a modifiable JSON file.

title: Navbar One-Line Layout
description: Consolidated navigation items to fit on a single line by reducing font sizes and removing flex-wrap.

title: Dice Tool
description: Added a dice rolling tool under Utils with support for multiple dice types.

title: Location Tool
description: Added a location-based utility tool under Utils.

title: Initial Setup
description: Set up the SolidJS project with routing, Tailwind CSS, and base pages (home, about, news, utils).
